title: Hit Color
description: A cool mod that changes the color of entities when they're hit ⚔️🎨
body:
# Hit Color

```yml
How to use?
- Install the mod from modrinth/github.
- Install cloth config.
- Press the keybind H on your keyboard to open the GUI.
- Turn on/off the settings as you want.
```
## Showcase:
----------
### Settings page
![Config](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vJofZXEN/images/8e9bb11acd2b597ef794b56ca756750914d06f51.png)
----------
### Setting The Keybind
![Keybind](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vJofZXEN/images/7f0132c9ec2b63c8dcedf80984df49df8c3c1bcd.png)
--------------------
### In Game Example (with rainbow mode enabled):
![Gif](https://github.com/I-No-oNe/Hit-Color/raw/main/assets/example.gif)
-----------------

**BE AWARE THAT YOU MUST TO DOWNLOAD [**CLOTH-CONFIG**](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) IN ORDER TO THE MOD TO WORK!**

------------------
**tysm for using this mod** 🙏
